answers: MMA (Mixed Martial Arts) combines striking (boxing/Muay Thai), grappling (wrestling/BJJ), and clinch work.
MMA basics: learn striking fundamentals, takedown defense, ground control, and submissions. Cross-train multiple arts.
Training: most MMA gyms teach all components. Expect hard workouts, sparring, and drilling techniques.
MMA is the fastest growing sport globally. UFC is the biggest promotion. Great for fitness even without competing.
